impact: This gives the worker a deterministic next-task path instead of retrying the same broad source-freshness implementation that repeatedly failed py_compile. It also prevents supervisor diagnostics from treating decomposed, intentionally blocked tasks as a reason to stop unrelated autonomous progress.
summary: Repair PP&D daemon supervision by cleaning the task board status area and documenting that blocked source-freshness work must be resumed through narrow syntax-first recovery tasks while independent DevHub guardrail work can continue.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-54: Add a source freshness fixture that classifies stale PP&D guidance, changed content hashes, removed pages, and recrawl priority without performing a live recrawl.; Task checkbox-55: Add a fixture-only change report renderer for public PP&D source freshness results that summarizes changed requirements, new or removed links, and affected permit-process fixtures with citation references.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
